atomic_facts.fact: The player is in a Minecraft world with a flat sandy terrain.
A lever is placed on a stone block and is currently activated.
Redstone dust trails connect to the lever block.
There are glass blocks containing water arranged in rows.
The player has a water bucket in the first hotbar slot and a glass block in the second selected slot.
The player's experience level is 13.
In the second frame, the camera zooms in on the lever and a glass block placed near the redstone.
